steps.title: Identify the key difference
steps.content: The notes reveal the defining contrast: Kosuth's neon sculpture spells out a phrase, while Dawood's forms an abstract shape.

steps.title: Find the choice that emphasizes this difference
steps.content:
Choice B states this directly: “one spells out a phrase while the other is decidedly more abstract.” The other three either dilute the focus with unrelated details (
  • A adds advertising history
  • C shifts to dates
  • D leaves the difference vague)
.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
